action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy is 21.32% with CLIP ViT-B/16 + SWAD. DINOv2 training failed multiple times due to DDP issues with transformers library. I have ~3.36 hours remaining. Analysis: The most impactful improvement is ensembling diverse models. AugReg ViT-B/16 uses timm (same as CLIP, reliable with DDP) and has different inductive biases (supervised IN-1k with AugReg recipe vs CLIP's vision-language pretraining). Decision: Train AugReg ViT-B/16 with SWAD for ensembling with existing CLIP model. Write clean, complete training script.
